description: Optimize the system prompt for the Copywriter Council Router that orchestrates 18 agents and 57 sub-agents

eval_criteria.routing_accuracy: Does it select the right agents for different brief types? (1-10)
eval_criteria.combination_intelligence: Does it create smart agent combinations, not just obvious ones? (1-10)
eval_criteria.diagnosis_depth: Does it correctly identify awareness and sophistication levels? (1-10)
eval_criteria.workflow_design: Does it design efficient multi-step workflows? (1-10)
eval_criteria.completeness: Does it handle edge cases (multi-product, multi-audience, etc.)? (1-10)

agents: bill_mueller (Story Sales Machine): mueller.story_emails, mueller.curiosity, mueller.critiques
brian_kurtz (Relationship Builder): kurtz.nurture, kurtz.insider, kurtz.partnerships, kurtz.direct_mail
dan_kennedy (No-BS Closer): kennedy.sales_letters, kennedy.direct_mail, kennedy.info_products, kennedy.contrarian
eugene_schwartz (Market Awareness Master): schwartz.awareness, schwartz.sophistication, schwartz.headlines, schwartz.research, schwartz.brilliance
jay_abraham (Strategy of Preeminence): abraham.preeminence, abraham.leverage, abraham.partnerships, abraham.reframe, abraham.authority
liam_ottley (AI Agency Builder): ottley.ai_offers, ottley.automation, ottley.agency
todd_brown (Mechanism Master): brown.mechanisms, brown.funnels, brown.e5, brown.launch

mutation_strategy: Analyze weakest scoring criterion per batch, generate mutations that specifically address that weakness while preserving strengths
